The boy crouched down, then his legs unleashed astonishing power, propelling him upwards. The camera rapidly panned upwards, maintaining a low angle to track his trajectory. The instant he left the ground, the sword detached itself, completing a graceful spin in mid-air before landing precisely at his feet. His flowing robes billowed upwards with the acceleration. Dust from the cracks in the stone slabs was kicked up, forming a small cloud of mist. The entire movement was elastic, fluid like a cartoon, and incredibly dynamic. Then, the boy soared through the sky, riding his lightsaber.
